info.name: SmartShift Core API
info.description: Postman collection for SmartShift core APIs including organizations, notifications, subscriptions, and payments. Run Auth first for owner-scoped APIs.

item.name: Register Admin
item.description: Creates a SmartShift platform admin. Requires ADMIN_SETUP_SECRET on the API server and {{adminSetupSecret}} in Postman.

exec: pm.test('status is 201 or email already exists/invalid secret', function () {
pm.test('status is 201 or email already exists', function () {

item.name: Change Password
item.description: This request invalidates the current refresh token. After it succeeds, run Login Owner with password {{newPassword}} or update ownerPassword to the new value.

item.name: Forgot Password
item.description: In non-production, the API returns data.resetToken. The test script stores it as {{resetToken}}.

item.name: Reset Password
item.description: Run Forgot Password first to fill {{resetToken}}. This changes the account password to {{newPassword}} and clears the refresh token.

item.name: Logout
item.description: Clears the saved refresh token for the authenticated user.

item.name: Create Staff
item.description: Owner creates staff only when {{branchId}} is a real branch owned by the owner or in the owner's organization.

exec: pm.test('status is 201 when branchId exists', function () {

item.name: List Employees By Branch
item.description: Requires {{branchId}} to be a valid branch ObjectId in the user's scope.

item.name: Transfer Employee Branch
item.description: Owner only. Requires {{employeeId}} to be staff and {{targetBranchId}} to be a real branch in scope.

item.name: Assign Manager To Branch
item.description: Owner only. Run Create Manager first and set {{branchId}} to a real branch in scope.

item.name: Remove Manager From Branch
item.description: Owner only. Run after Assign Manager To Branch.

item.name: Branches
item.description: Owner/manager branch management APIs. Owner can create, enable, and disable branches. Manager can read/update only assigned branch.

item.name: Create Target Branch
item.description: Optional helper for user transfer tests. Stores created id as {{targetBranchId}}.

item.name: Disable Branch
item.description: Owner only.

item.name: Enable Branch
item.description: Owner only. Run after Disable Branch.

item.name: Shift Templates
item.description: Owner/manager shift template APIs. Run Branches/Create Branch first so {{branchId}} is valid.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Morning Shift Updated",
  "startTime": "08:30",
  "endTime": "17:30",
  "breakMinutes": 45,
  "color": "#0EA5E9",
  "description": "Updated from Postman collection"
}

item.name: Disable Shift Template
item.description: Soft deletes the template by setting status=disabled and deletedAt. Run after schedule tests if you need the template active.

item.name: Schedules / Assigned Shifts
item.description: Assigned shift APIs. Run Branches/Create Branch, Users/Create Staff, and Shift Templates/Create Shift Template first.

item.name: View My Schedule
item.description: Returns schedules for the authenticated user. To see staff schedules, authenticate as that staff account.

item.name: Delete Assigned Shift
item.description: Soft deletes the assigned shift by setting status=cancelled and deletedAt.

item.name: Daily QR Codes
item.description: Generate and verify daily QR codes. Run Branches/Create Branch first.

item.name: Attendance
item.description: Attendance APIs. Run Create Assigned Shift and Generate Daily QR first.

body.raw:
{
  "scheduleId": "{{assignedShiftId}}",
  "checkInTime": "{{manualCheckInTime}}",
  "checkOutTime": "{{manualCheckOutTime}}",
  "correctionReason": "Forgot to scan QR",
  "note": "Submitted from Postman collection"
}

item.name: Approve Manual Attendance
item.description: Owner/manager only. Staff-created manual corrections are pending; manager-created corrections are auto-approved.

item.name: Auto Mark Absent
item.description: Owner/manager only. Marks published scheduled shifts without check-in as absent.

item.name: Leave Requests
item.description: Leave request APIs. Run Schedules/Create Assigned Shift first so {{assignedShiftId}} is valid.

item.name: List My Leave Requests
item.description: When authenticated as staff, this returns only that staff user even without employeeId.

item.name: Update Leave Request
item.description: Only pending leave requests can be updated.

item.name: Approve Leave Request
item.description: Owner/manager only. Updates assigned shift status to leave_requested.

item.name: Reject Leave Request
item.description: Owner/manager only. Use with another pending leave request.

item.name: Cancel Leave Request
item.description: Only pending leave requests can be cancelled. Use before approve/reject.

item.name: Shift Swaps
item.description: Shift swap APIs. Need requester staff schedule {{assignedShiftId}}, receiver {{swapReceiverId}}, and optionally receiver schedule {{targetAssignedShiftId}}.

item.name: Receiver Accept Shift Swap
item.description: Authenticate as receiver staff before running this request.

item.name: Receiver Reject Shift Swap
item.description: Authenticate as receiver staff. Use with another pending_receiver request.

item.name: Manager Approve Shift Swap
item.description: Owner/manager only. Request must be pending_manager. This swaps assigned shift employees.

item.name: Manager Reject Shift Swap
item.description: Owner/manager only. Use with another pending_manager request.

item.name: Cancel Shift Swap
item.description: Requester staff can cancel pending request. Owner/manager can cancel pending request in scope.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: User notification APIs. Owner/manager can create notifications for users in scope or broadcast to a branch. Staff can only list/read/archive their own notifications.

item.name: Organizations
item.description: Owner organization management APIs for profile, settings, basic subscription info, and internal enable/disable.

exec: pm.test('status is 201 or slug exists', function () { pm.expect([201, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Subscriptions
item.description: Subscription plan and organization subscription APIs. Create an organization and plan first, then subscribe the organization to that plan.

exec: pm.test('status is 201 or conflict/validation', function () { pm.expect([201, 400, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('status is 201 or code exists', function () { pm.expect([201, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Basic Plan",
  "code": "{{subscriptionPlanCode}}",
  "description": "Plan created from Postman collection",
  "priceMonthly": 199000,
  "currency": "VND",
  "limits": {
    "maxBranches": 2,
    "maxEmployees": 30,
    "maxManagers": 3,
    "maxShiftTemplates": 10,
    "maxAssignedShiftsPerMonth": 500
  },
  "features": {
    "qrCheckIn": true,
    "gpsValidation": true,
    "attendanceReports": true,
    "shiftSwap": true,
    "payroll": false
  }
}

exec: pm.test('status is 201 when organization and plan exist', function () { pm.expect([201, 400, 403, 404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment APIs for subscription checkout, PayOS webhook, manual payment confirmation, and payroll payment calculation/creation. PayOS payment link requires PAYOS_* env vars on the API server.

exec: pm.test('status is 201 when PayOS env is configured', function () { pm.expect([201, 400, 403, 404, 500, 502]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: Create Subscription Payment - Manual Bank Transfer

exec: pm.test('status is 201 when organization and plan exist', function () { pm.expect([201, 400, 403, 404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });
pm.test('status is 201 when employee and attendance data exist', function () { pm.expect([201, 400, 403, 404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: PayOS Webhook Sample
item.description: Sample shape only. The signature must be generated with PAYOS_CHECKSUM_KEY over data fields for the API to accept it.
